goal: Visit this page, take a screenshot, rate the design /10 as a senior product designer. Note 2 concrete defects. This is cloud.tangle.tools — a dark-themed blockchain services dashboard. One-line verdict per page.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark-themed blockchain services dashboard 'Payments > Shielded Pool' page out of 10. Assess: visual hierarchy, consistency with the rest of the dashboard, typography/readability, spacing, color contrast, empty state quality (if present), payments-specific UI patterns, overall polish. Identify 2 specific design defects.

steps.expectedEffect: Receive a comprehensive design evaluation with a numerical rating out of 10, identification of 2 concrete defects, and insights about the Payments > Shielded Pool page design quality compared to other pages in the Tangle Cloud dashboard.
